scripts.dev:all: npm run dev & npm run api:dev
scripts.api: cd lifo_api && npx --yes uv@latest run uvicorn app.main:app --port 8000 --host 0.0.0.0 --workers 4
scripts.api:dev: cd lifo_api && npx --yes uv@latest run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.api:check: cd lifo_api && npx --yes uv@latest run ruff check . && npx --yes uv@latest run ruff format --check . && npx --yes uv@latest run mypy . --show-error-codes --pretty
scripts.api:check:fix: cd lifo_api && npx --yes uv@latest run ruff check --fix . && npx --yes uv@latest run ruff format .
scripts.api:type-check: cd lifo_api && npx --yes uv@latest run mypy . --show-error-codes --pretty
scripts.api:test: cd lifo_api && npx --yes uv@latest run pytest
scripts.api:test:unit: cd lifo_api && npx --yes uv@latest run pytest tests/unit/
scripts.api:test:integration: cd lifo_api && npx --yes uv@latest run pytest tests/integration/
scripts.api:test:security: cd lifo_api && npx --yes uv@latest run pytest tests/security/
scripts.api:test:performance: cd lifo_api && npx --yes uv@latest run pytest tests/performance/
scripts.api:test:coverage: cd lifo_api && npx --yes uv@latest run pytest --cov=app --cov-report=html --cov-report=term
scripts.api:test:watch: cd lifo_api && npx --yes uv@latest run pytest-watch
scripts.update-types: npx supabase gen types typescript --project-id jrgmetdsohowtxickqij --schema user_mgmt,timeseries,scoring,inventory,business,analytics,public > types/supabase.ts
